hooks.command: bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/user_prompt_submit.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-serena-mcp/local/hooks/user_prompt_submit.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/prepare_auto_sync.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-serena-mcp/local/hooks/prepare_auto_sync.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/mark_sync_required.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-serena-mcp/local/hooks/mark_sync_required.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for p in "plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/stop_memory_sync.sh" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/rldyour-codex/rldyour-serena-mcp/local/hooks/stop_memory_sync.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; exit 0'
